text.started: A humming crate sits in the open, vibrating with the promise of something valuable or very loud.
progress: Crate search: listening to the hum and prying the seam. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Crate search: a small mechanism clicks; fingers are involved. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Crate search: the crate yields a suspiciously smug smaller box. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Humming crate search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a lingering sense of poor decisions.
text.failed: Humming crate search failed. The crate kept its secrets and its smugness.

text.started: Climbing soggy stairs to the top floor in search of a crate that smells like opportunity and mildew.
progress: Top-floor search: wading through soggy carpet and regret. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Top-floor search: prying a waterlogged locker open. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Top-floor search: found something wrapped in plastic and optimism. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Top-floor search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a damp sense of triumph.
text.failed: Top-floor search failed. The water had better ideas.

text.started: A locker labeled STAYCATION hums with the faint scent of someone who planned to relax and then didn't.
progress: Locker search: rattling shelves and a suspiciously philosophical note. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Locker search: found a small stash and a pamphlet about patience. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Locker search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a questionable life lesson.
text.failed: Locker search failed. The locker kept its secrets and its smug pamphlet.

text.started: A tiny shrine of emergency snacks sits under a warning label. It looks like someone left a very specific offering.
progress: Shrine search: pocketing trial mix and leaving a bolt as tribute. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Shrine search completed. Took the snack and left a small offering.
text.failed: Shrine search failed. The shrine judged you and kept its offerings.

text.started: A clipboard with a launch manifest peeks from under rubble. Someone's plans are either delayed or dramatic.
progress: Clipboard search: flipping through crossed-out names and a hopeful WAITLIST. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Clipboard search: found a small token tucked in the pages. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Clipboard search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a bureaucratic souvenir.
text.failed: Clipboard search failed. The manifest remained stubbornly bureaucratic.

text.started: A small museum of warning signs begs to be catalogued. Every sign says DO NOT. You take the smallest one.
progress: Museum search: peeling a label and finding a trinket behind it. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Museum search: the smallest sign hides a tiny compartment. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Museum search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a tiny victory.
text.failed: Museum search failed. The signs remained stubbornly prohibitive.

text.started: A crate opens to reveal a smaller crate inside. The smaller crate looks smug and possibly trapped.
progress: Decoy search: prying nested crates and checking for surprises. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Decoy search: the inner crate hums faintly. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Decoy search: found a tiny compartment and a note that says 'sorry'. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Decoy crate search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a sense of being toyed with.
text.failed: Decoy crate search failed. The crates kept their secrets.

text.started: A key labeled TURNKEY sits on a shelf with no door in sight. Destiny loves clutter.
progress: Key search: pocketing the key and wondering what it opens. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Turnkey search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a mystery.
text.failed: Turnkey search failed. The key remained unclaimed.

text.started: A supply drop landed in a puddle with perfect comedic timing. The crate is wet but promising.
progress: Puddle search: fishing out soggy packages and drying them with optimism. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Puddle search: found a surprisingly intact item wrapped in plastic. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Puddle search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a damp grin.
text.failed: Puddle search failed. The water had better ideas.

text.started: A field cache looks almost too generous. You check for traps, curses, and paperwork.
progress: Cache search: sifting through batteries, receipts, and suspicious generosity. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Cache search: found a high-value item tucked under a receipt. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Cache search: the cache hums like a deal with fine print. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Field cache search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a small ethical dilemma.
text.failed: Field cache search failed. The generosity was a mirage.

text.started: A humming black-box cache hides behind a panel. It smells like value and questionable warranties.
progress: Black-box search: delicate prying and a lot of holding your breath. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Black-box search: a mechanism resists; you cajole it with tools and threats. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Black-box search: found a compact, valuable module. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Black-box search: final checks and a small victory dance. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Black-box search completed. Packed {loot_name} and a sense of professional smugness.
text.failed: Black-box search failed. The cache remained stubbornly sealed.

text.started: A quick sweep for small useful things: batteries, pens, and the kind of item that makes you feel slightly richer.
progress: Quick grab: pocketing small items with the speed of someone who values time. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Quick grab completed. Packed {loot_name}.
text.failed: Quick grab failed. The small things were not in the mood to be found.

text.started: A tiny something gleams from the corner. Worth investigating.
progress: Quick grab: snatching a small valuable before moving on. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Found a small trinket worth pocketing.
text.failed: The trinket slipped away. Happens.

text.started: A small cache sits partially exposed. Time is limited.
progress: Quick grab: pocketing items and moving on. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Grabbed a few small valuables. Classic raid optimization.
text.failed: Items scattered before grab could complete.

text.started: A small stash becomes apparent. The search begins.
progress: Searching: prying and collecting. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Final grab: squeezing in the last item. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Collected a small but worthwhile haul.
text.failed: The stash proved less cooperative than hoped.

text.started: A small compartment reveals itself. Investigation warranted.
progress: Searching: opening drawers and prying panels. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Final collection: packing the goods. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Found a respectable collection of small items.
text.failed: The compartment jammed. A modest setback.

text.started: A promising corner drawer sits within reach. Worth the effort.
progress: Searching: careful extraction of items. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Packing: nothing gets left behind. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Secured a solid collection of valuables.
text.failed: The drawer's lock proved stubbornly reliable.

text.started: A locked cabinet has caught your eye. The key situation is... optimistic.
progress: Searching: picking and negotiating with locks. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Final sweep: grabbing everything portable. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Collected a decent stash of valuable items.
text.failed: The lock held. Disappointing. Predictable.

text.started: A comprehensive collection area presents itself. This will take effort but payoff looks promising.
progress: Searching: cataloguing and extracting high-value items. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Organizing: fitting everything into backpack geometry. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Final check: nothing valuable left behind. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Scored a substantial haul of valuable items. Backpack is now very happy and concerned.
text.failed: The location proved too complex to fully exploit in time.

text.started: Searching a black-box cache labeled VALUE ADJACENT. Raider is using both hands and neither lesson.
progress: Cache search: drawer opened, pride closed. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Cache search: something clicked in a way that suggests either loot or paperwork. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Cache search: Raider found wires, dust, and a very confident warning label. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Cache search completed. Packed {loot_name} and called it expertise.
text.failed: Cache search failed. The cache contained only silence and a judgmental hinge.

text.started: Searching for water bottles with the intensity of someone building a museum nobody asked for.
progress: Water search: checking under a crate, inside a crate, and emotionally near a crate. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Water search: Raider shook something plastic and declared it promising. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Water search completed. Packed {loot_name}. Hydration empire expands.
text.failed: Water search failed. Found only a bottle-shaped shadow and a personal flaw.

text.started: Searching medical supplies labeled PROBABLY CLEAN. Raider has accepted the legal risk.
progress: Medical search: checking every pouch with more optimism than gloves. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Medical search: found gauze, lint, and a tiny printed liability waiver. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Medical search completed. Tucked {healing_item} into the current-raid med pocket.
text.failed: Medical search failed. The pouch contained only crumbs and one very judgmental cotton swab.

text.started: Searching a crate labeled ELECTRICAL MAYBE. Raider is pretending that is a safety rating.
progress: Shield-recharger search: wires inspected, confidence not inspected. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Shield-recharger search: something inside snapped bravely. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Shield-recharger search completed. Packed {shield_recharger} for a future confidence emergency.
text.failed: Shield-recharger search failed. The crate contained one spark and a smell called consequences.

text.started: Extraction hazard started. The LZ has opinions.
progress: Extraction hazard in progress. {damage_summary}
text.completed: Extraction hazard resolved. {damage_summary}
text.failed: Extraction hazard fizzled. The LZ looked disappointed.

text.started: Extraction thread opened. LZ timer: {ticks_remaining} ticks.
progress: Extraction thread: {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining. Raider is negotiating with flares and panic.
Extraction thread: {ticks_remaining} ticks left. Backpack is making aircraft-weight arguments.
Extraction thread: {ticks_remaining} ticks to go. Shuttle pilot is using the patient voice.
text.completed: Extraction thread closed. Raider made it back with the bag and several legal questions.
text.failed: Extraction thread failed. LZ rejected the vibes; raid continues.

text.started: Downed thread opened. {tick_count} before the zone writes the ending.
progress: Downed thread: {tick_count} left for a miracle or medically questionable idea.
Downed thread: {tick_count} until recovery paperwork becomes extremely relevant.
Downed thread: {tick_count} before gravity wins the argument.
text.completed: Downed thread closed. Raider is upright and loudly disputing gravity.
text.failed: Downed thread failed. Recovery team is preparing the apology clipboard.

text.started: Extraction bonus: perfect timing and optimal greed payoff. Morale spike incoming.
text.completed: Extraction bonus applied. Raider is basking in the safe-house glow.
text.failed: Extraction bonus fizzled. Still counts as leaving alive, but with less pizzazz.

text.started: Extraction thread opened in hostile zone. LZ timer: {ticks_remaining} ticks. Shuttle is very quiet.
progress: Extraction thread (high-danger): {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining. Everything is on fire. This is fine.
Extraction thread (high-danger): {ticks_remaining} ticks left. Shuttle pilot upgraded to meditation voice.
Extraction thread (high-danger): {ticks_remaining} ticks to go. The zone has opinions about everyone leaving.
text.completed: Extraction thread closed. Raider made it back with the bag and several new trauma memories.
text.failed: Extraction thread failed. The zone had stronger opinions than the shuttle.

text.started: Extraction complication: robots still in the zone. Shuttle pilot is reconsidering patience.
progress: Close call: {ticks_remaining} ticks. Everyone is sprinting. Dignity is a luxury.
Close call: {ticks_remaining} ticks. The backpack is dragging slightly. Pilot is honking.
text.completed: Close call resolved. Made it aboard. Shuttle lifted off with extreme enthusiasm.
text.failed: Close call failed. Shuttle left without us. Radio traffic is very blue.

text.started: Downed thread opened in high-danger zone. {tick_count} before things get worse.
progress: Downed thread (high-danger): {tick_count} left. The zone is not sympathetic to medical emergencies.
text.completed: Downed thread closed. Raider got lucky and is upright. Still arguing with gravity.
text.failed: Downed thread failed. The zone declined to cooperate with recovery efforts.

text.started: Revival signal sent. Raider is attempting to use remaining Signal for emergency revival.
progress: Revival attempt: medkit activation... systems responding... profanity increasing.
text.completed: Revival completed. Raider staggered upright. Dignity remains negotiable.
text.failed: Revival failed. Medkit was empty or defective. Sometimes both.
